description_long: This is a tall, floor-standing stereo speaker system with a rectangular columnar shape and a slightly rounded top. The front face features two large, circular white speaker cones and a smaller black tweeter above them, all set within a gray panel. The sides and rear are finished in a dark, wood-like texture, giving it a sleek and modern appearance. The back panel includes a small recessed area near the base with two visible binding post connectors for speaker wire attachment. The base is slightly wider, providing stability for the tall structure. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible branding or control panels.
description: A tall, modern floor-standing stereo speaker with dual white speaker cones, a black tweeter, and a dark wood-textured finish. The rear features binding post connectors for audio input.
description_view_0: The left side view shows a smooth, dark wood-textured surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_1: The front view displays two large white speaker cones and a black tweeter set in a gray panel, characteristic of a high-fidelity stereo speaker.
description_view_2: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the same uninterrupted dark wood-textured surface.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals a gray panel with a recessed area near the base containing two binding post connectors for speaker wires.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The front panel appears to have no visible grille, exposing the speaker cones and tweeter directly.
